description_long: This is a life-sized marble sculpture of a robed human figure, standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure is draped in intricately carved, flowing garments that cascade in naturalistic folds, with one arm bent and holding a cylindrical object close to the chest. The head is missing, but the detailed treatment of the drapery and the stance suggest a classical or Roman style. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the robe falling in heavier, less articulated folds. The surface shows subtle variations in color, with some areas appearing slightly weathered or stained, indicating age or exposure.
description: A headless, life-sized marble sculpture of a robed human figure, standing on a rectangular base with detailed drapery and classical styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed folds of the robe, the missing head, and the figure's right hand holding a cylindrical object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the drapery and the arm's position across the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the less detailed, heavier folds of the robe and the back of the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the drapery's flow and the figure's stance, with the arm and hand partially visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
